title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - Yes
scenario: Reset device to factory default settings and verify all settings are restored to default values
steps: Start Lens App with headset connected and go to Device Settings.
Change all settings to non-default values.
Tap on Reset Device tab and verify "Restore Defaults" and "Clear Trusted Devices" fields are present with correct descriptions.
Tap Restore button and verify confirmation popup with "No" and "Yes" buttons.
Tap Yes and verify success popup with "Settings Restored!" message and OK button.
Tap OK and verify app returns to Home Screen.
Verify all settings have been restored to default values.
expected: All settings are restored to default values and the app returns to the Home Screen after successful reset.
